recommendations.title: Dude, Where's My Car?
recommendations.overview: Two stoners wake up after a night of partying and cannot remember where they parked their car.

recommendations.title: Ae Dil Hai Mushkil
recommendations.overview: Ayan falls in love with his soulmate, Alizeh, but she doesn’t reciprocate the feeling. Later, a relationship with Saba helps him realize Alizeh’s value in his life, irrespective of their relationship status.

recommendations.title: Delirious
recommendations.overview: A soap opera writer gets hit on the head and wakes up as a character in his own show.

recommendations.title: The Thief
recommendations.overview: Katya and her 6-year-old son Sanya, who, in 1952, meet a veteran Soviet officer named Tolyan. Katya falls in love with Tolyan, who turns out to be a small time criminal, but who also becomes a father figure to Sanya ...

recommendations.title: Lost in Translation
recommendations.overview: Two lost souls visiting Tokyo -- the young, neglected wife of a photographer and a washed-up movie star shooting a TV commercial -- find an odd solace and pensive freedom to be real in each other's company, away from their lives in America.

recommendations.title: I Do...Knot
recommendations.overview: Sebastian is very lucky with women, going to parties and getting drunk every night. His mother asks him to change his way of life but he refuses to stop partying and meeting new women. One day, after one night of serious partying he wakes up with a b

recommendations.title: You Do You
recommendations.overview: Merve chose the bohemian life, but it didn't choose her back. Faced with eviction, she starts a new job and stumbles into a spicy setup with her boss.

recommendations.title: Courier
recommendations.overview: Ivan Mirosnikov, a cheeky young man in the Gorbachev era, is trying to figure out what to do with his life (he's not in college, and the 2-year mandatory military service is looming large ahead of him). Meanwhile, he lives with his divorced mother, a

recommendations.title: Dance Academy: The Movie
recommendations.overview: This 2017 movie follows the original dance academy TV show and tracks where the characters are in their lives now.

recommendations.title: The Invisible Woman
recommendations.overview: A man is abandoned by his wife and then falls in love with his neighbor, the perfect, ideal woman. The only problem: she doesn't exist!
